data.title: AFDG becomes first US public company in DRC; Economic and Investment Forum hosted in Washington, D.C. (October 16, 2025).
data.description: The Economic and Investment Forum hosted by the United States and the Democratic Republic of the Congo in Washington, D.C took place on October 16, 2025. This event aimed to strengthen economic ties between the two nations. Over a two-day period, government officials and business leaders from both countries convened to discuss investment opportunities and collaboration. Significant topics included infrastructure development, trade partnerships, and investment projects. The forum saw the participation of over 200 delegates, with discussions centered on increasing bilateral trade and fostering economic growth. Through this initiative, both the US and the DRC seek to enhance cooperation and stimulate investment, highlighting the potential for future economic development between the two nations.

data.title: Kaizen Circularity AI launches SaaS Platform to cut raw material costs, enhance metal production, and promote sustainability.
data.description: Atlanta-based Kaizen Circularity AI, Inc., revealed on October 16, 2025, the release of its new Circularity AI Platform. This technology company aims to boost the circular economy within metals manufacturing. The platform, a Software as a Service (SaaS) application, operates through the cloud and is designed to assist metal producers in enhancing their sustainability efforts.

data.title: ESP Lab, founded in 1965, appoints Howard Sherman as president to mark its 60th anniversary and usher in an Age of Enlightenment.
data.description: Established in 1965 by the renowned Occult Master Al Manning, ESP Lab is now entering a promising new chapter. Recently, on October 16, 2025, the organization revealed Howard Sherman as its new president. With a vision to bring forth a new Age of Enlightenment, Sherman aims to captivate both present and upcoming audiences with spiritual teachings.

data.title: Investment firm BlackRock plans to enter growing stablecoin market with revamped fund following GENIUS Act for secure issuer reserves.
data.description: BlackRock is venturing into the stablecoin industry by launching a revamped money market fund that aligns with the recently enacted GENIUS Act. This move aims to offer a dependable reserve option for issuers looking for stability in the market.

data.title: Kenya's data center market: Existing capacity 20MW, upcoming 200MW. Nairobi leads with 45% power capacity. 25MW expected by 2025. - ResearchAndMarkets.com
data.description: A recent database "Kenya Existing & Upcoming Data Center Portfolio" has been incorporated into ResearchAndMarkets.com. Nairobi holds the lead in Kenya's upcoming data center market, with over 45% of the total power capacity. Currently, the existing data center capacity in Kenya stands at close to 20 MW, while the forthcoming capacity is projected to reach approximately 200 MW. By the conclusion of 2025, an estimated 25 MW of extra power capacity is anticipated to be introduced. The data signifies the significant growth and potential in the data center sector in Kenya.

data.title: Bloomreach and Databricks collaborate to link data for real-time marketing; partnership announced in Mountain View.
data.description: Bloomreach has recently revealed a collaboration with Databricks, a prominent data and AI firm based in Mountain View, California. This partnership aims to leverage the expertise of both companies to enhance their AI capabilities. This collaboration signifies a significant step forward in the industry as it combines Bloomreach's AI technology with Databricks' data solutions. The exact details of the partnership, including the duration and specific projects involved, have not been disclosed yet. Excitement surrounds this partnership as it brings together two key players in the AI field, promising innovative developments in the future.

data.title: Cachengo introduces CachengoGPT, leveraging noBGP's MCP to connect LLMs like ChatGPT, Claude to multiple compute instances efficiently - improving performance.
data.description: CachengoGPT, utilizing noBGP's MCP orchestration, effortlessly links ChatGPT, Claude, VS Code, Cursor, and various LLMs to distributed compute instances sans public IPs or intricate setups. Headquartered in PARIS-SACLAY, France, Cachengo, an AI and compute trailblazer, announces this integration on Oct. 16, 2025.

data.title: SurgePays reports 60% Q3 revenue growth, affirms $225 million guidance for 2026. Diverse revenue streams drive expansion.
data.description: The Company is strategically focusing on various revenue channels, with Lifeline being the most efficient route to achieving near-term profitability. Additionally, the ClearLine SaaS platform, fintech top-up, LinkUp, and MVNE services are expected to drive expansion beyond 2026. Revenue for the third quarter of 2025 is projected to show a sequential increase over the previous period.

data.title: Breakthrough study on IASO Bio's Anti-BCMA CAR-T in MS; published by Cell - Focus on innovation in cell therapies
data.description: On October 16, 2025, IASO Biotherapeutics, a biopharmaceutical company based in Shanghai, Nanjing, China, and Pleasanton, California, disclosed that they have released a groundbreaking study in Cell. Specializing in pioneering cell therapies, IASO Bio is dedicated to advancing the discovery, development, manufacturing, and distribution of cutting-edge treatments. This announcement marks a significant milestone for the firm in its mission to revolutionize healthcare.

data.title: Korea University researchers develop AI model for orthodontics, predicting puberty growth peaks with 67% fewer errors.
data.description: A recently developed AI model in Seoul, South Korea has shown a significant improvement in identifying puberty growth peaks with a reduction of 67% in errors. This advancement is aiding orthodontists in timing treatments more accurately. The key role of timing treatments to align with a child's growth peak for maximum effectiveness is well recognized in orthodontics. The AI model is proving to be a valuable tool for clinicians in enhancing treatment precision and efficiency. This development is anticipated to greatly benefit the orthodontic field by enabling more precise treatment planning based on individual growth patterns.

data.title: Miraculous Corp marks 10 years of Ladybug and Cat Noir with new merchandise range, including toys, books, and costumes.
data.description: In Hollywood, California, on October 16, 2025, the popular animated series Miraculous – Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir, produced by Miraculous Corp, is marking its 10th anniversary. The show is unveiling a range of new merchandise to commemorate the occasion, featuring a variety of products such as toys, costumes, jewelry, books, and others. This collection will be available just in time for fans to enjoy the celebration.
